mapper.insert: insert into tbl_community (creator_id, community_name, description, category_id) values (#{creatorId}, #{communityName}, #{description}, #{categoryId})
mapper.update: update tbl_community set community_name = #{communityName}, description = #{description}, category_id = #{categoryId}, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id}
update tbl_community set community_status = #{status}::community_status, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select v.*, case when exists ( select 1 from tbl_community_member cm2 where cm2.community_id = v.id and cm2.member_id = #{memberId} ) then true else false end as is_joined, case when v.creator_id = #{memberId} then 'creator' else (select cm3.member_role::text from tbl_community_member cm3 where cm3.community_id = v.id and cm3.member_id = #{memberId}) end as my_role from view_community_feed v where v.id = #{id}
select count(*) from tbl_community where community_status = 'active'
select count(*) from tbl_community_member where member_id = #{memberId}
select count(*) from view_community_feed where category_id = #{categoryId}
mapper.sql: p.id, p.member_id, p.title as post_title, p.content as post_content, p.created_datetime, p.updated_datetime, p.community_id, m.member_nickname, m.member_handle, (select f.file_path from tbl_member_profile_file mpf join tbl_file f on mpf.id = f.id where mpf.member_id = p.member_id and mpf.profile_image_type = 'profile' limit 1) as member_profile_file_name, coalesce(lc.cnt, 0) as like_count, coalesce(rc.cnt, 0) as reply_count, coalesce(bc.cnt, 0) as bookmark_count, case when pl2.post_id is not null then true else false end as is_liked, case when bk2.post_id is not null then true else false end as is_bookmarked
mapper.select: select * from view_community_feed where (community_name ilike concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or description ilike concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) order by member_count desc, created_datetime desc limit #{criteria.count} offset #{criteria.offset}
select count(*) from view_community_feed where (community_name ilike concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or description ilike concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

select from tbl_post p join tbl_member m on p.member_id = m.id
where p.community_id = #{communityId} and p.post_status = 'active' and p.reply_post_id is null order by p.created_datetime desc limit #{criteria.count} offset #{criteria.offset}
select count(*) from tbl_post where community_id = #{communityId} and post_status = 'active' and reply_post_id is null

select from tbl_post p join tbl_member m on p.member_id = m.id
where p.community_id = #{communityId} and p.post_status = 'active' and p.reply_post_id is null
and (p.title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or m.member_handle like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or m.member_nickname like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
order by like_count desc order by p.created_datetime desc
limit #{criteria.count} offset #{criteria.offset}

select count(*) from tbl_post p join tbl_member m on p.member_id = m.id where p.community_id = #{communityId} and p.post_status = 'active' and p.reply_post_id is null
and (p.title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or m.member_handle like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or m.member_nickname like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

select pf.id, pf.post_id, pf.file_id, f.original_name, f.file_name, f.file_path, f.file_size, f.content_type, f.created_datetime from tbl_post p join tbl_post_file pf on pf.post_id = p.id join tbl_file f on pf.file_id = f.id where p.community_id = #{communityId} and p.post_status = 'active' order by f.created_datetime desc limit #{criteria.count} offset #{criteria.offset}
select count(*) from tbl_post p join tbl_post_file pf on pf.post_id = p.id where p.community_id = #{communityId} and p.post_status = 'active'

select , c.community_name, (select cat.category_name from tbl_category cat where cat.id = c.category_id) as category_name from tbl_post p join tbl_member m on p.member_id = m.id join tbl_community c on p.community_id = c.id
where p.community_id in (select community_id from tbl_community_member where member_id = #{memberId}) and p.post_status = 'active' and p.reply_post_id is null and c.community_status = 'active' order by p.created_datetime desc limit #{criteria.count} offset #{criteria.offset}

select count(*) from tbl_post p join tbl_community c on p.community_id = c.id where p.community_id in (select community_id from tbl_community_member where member_id = #{memberId}) and p.post_status = 'active' and p.reply_post_id is null and c.community_status = 'active'

select , c.community_name, (select cat.category_name from tbl_category cat where cat.id = c.category_id) as category_name from tbl_post p join tbl_member m on p.member_id = m.id join tbl_community c on p.community_id = c.id
where p.community_id not in (select community_id from tbl_community_member where member_id = #{memberId}) and p.member_id = c.creator_id and p.post_status = 'active' and p.reply_post_id is null and c.community_status = 'active'
and (c.category_id = #{categoryId} or c.category_id in (select id from tbl_category where product_category_parent_id = #{categoryId}))
order by p.created_datetime desc limit #{criteria.count} offset #{criteria.offset}

select count(*) from tbl_post p join tbl_community c on p.community_id = c.id where p.community_id not in (select community_id from tbl_community_member where member_id = #{memberId}) and p.member_id = c.creator_id and p.post_status = 'active' and p.reply_post_id is null and c.community_status = 'active'
and (c.category_id = #{categoryId} or c.category_id in (select id from tbl_category where product_category_parent_id = #{categoryId}))
